title: Add alsoKnownAs to ActivityPub actor documents
description: Include alsoKnownAs array in actor JSON: did:web value (always present, derived from domain+username) and did:key value (if stored). Matches gaja activitypub.rs lines 200-210 and smallhold activitypub.rs lines 139-146. Only add alsoKnownAs when at least one DID is available.
